授業方法: This course will be held in English, with a range of readings, videos and discussions about AI topics. We will also be using AI tools in class,  trying out the various forms of generative AI as we learn about them. Students will create an online portfolio (using Google Sites) to share their generative AI creations and reflections.

第1回:
【Startup Week】Implementation Format："Online class（On-demand format）" 《30 minutes》

 Here is the introductory video for this course: (link to be provided here).

 Respond to Google Form with self-introduction and any experiences of using AI: (link to be provided).

 Note: Our first face-to-face class is the NEXT week.

Implementation Format："Face-to-face class"  《90minutes》

- Self-introductions

トピック.授業外学習2:
【Core Weeks】
Students will do homework including practical AI tasks, task reflections on portfolio, AI news research, & report/presentation preparation, as requested by teacher in core class.

As stipulated by teacher in core class.
